comment: "The knowledge, concepts, awareness, skills and relevance of all things which I have learned in this course were superb. I will use the information acquired in this course in my daily practice."

"I liked the pace of the presentation and the aspect of the different types of harvested grafts and their preferable points of use. Also, the complications to donor and recipient's site and actions needed to take in each scenario. Finally, the Mathes and Nahai classification refresher for me was interesting."

"I actually recommended this video to people at work, especially to staff that closely work with reconstructive plastic surgeries. Very helpful for me as I deal with orthopaedic oncology cases that usually need reconstructive surgery."
"I really appreciate that the course briefly summarized the most commonly used workhorse flaps in a descriptive manner."
